theme: 一盘自然石和矿物，为什么越来越像成年人桌面的安静玄学

items.title: 窗边托盘第一排
items.description: 一盘石头被认真摆好之后，桌面就会忽然长出一点像仪式的安静。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, tray of natural stones and small minerals arranged by size on a desk by the window, soft side light, tactile surfaces, calm collector atmosphere, highly save-worthy Xiaohongshu realism, no logos, no readable text.

items.title: 掌心纹理对照
items.description: 很多人喜欢石头，不是因为懂矿物学，而是因为手心真的会记住那些纹理。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, close-up of a palm holding one polished natural stone with clear veins and textures, skin lines echoing mineral patterns, quiet intimate detail, no logos, no readable text.

items.title: 抽屉分格里的小标签
items.description: 把石头分格收进抽屉的人，往往也在替自己的情绪做一种温柔分类。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, drawer organizer with small natural stones sorted into sections on velvet, tiny handwritten-like labels obscured and unreadable, careful private collection ritual, no logos, no readable text.

items.title: 办公桌角落的压纸石
items.description: 有些石头不需要解释功效，只要放在工位上，就会让桌面气质完全变掉。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, office desk corner with a beautiful natural stone used as a paperweight beside notebook and laptop, muted daylight, tasteful personality projection, no logos, no readable text.

items.title: 绒布上的冷暖混排
items.description: 冷色和暖色石头摆在一起的时候，会像一个人把理性和迷信同时留在桌上。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, cool-toned and warm-toned natural stones mixed on dark velvet cloth, subtle shadows, collector styling, meditative but modern, no logos, no readable text.

items.title: 出门前挑一颗随身石
items.description: 很多人带石头出门，并不是迷信，而是想给一天带一点具体的安定感。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, hand selecting one small natural stone to carry before leaving home, open tray on entry table, keys and bag nearby, everyday ritual realism, no logos, no readable text.

items.title: 咖啡杯旁的透光晶体
items.description: 石头真正进入日常的时刻，往往就是它开始和咖啡杯、键盘、书页待在一起。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, translucent mineral crystal beside a coffee cup on a reading table, morning routine objects around it, beautiful natural light and texture, no logos, no readable text.

items.title: 朋友交换观石的小桌
items.description: 当石头开始被朋友之间轮流传看，它就从装饰物变成了一种小型社交语言。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, small table where friends compare and pass around natural stones and minerals, curious hands, tea cups, gentle social atmosphere, realistic lifestyle scene, no logos, no readable text.

items.title: 夜灯下的半透明边缘
items.description: 有些石头只有在夜灯下才真正好看，就像很多人的情绪也只在晚上变得可见。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, one semi-translucent natural stone glowing softly under a bedside lamp at night, shadowy intimate room, quiet emotional atmosphere, no logos, no readable text.

items.title: 笔记本上压着的许愿石
items.description: 把石头压在笔记本上的那一刻，很多人其实是在给愿望找一个物理重量。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, small wish stone resting on top of a notebook or journal, pen nearby, sunlight across the page, poetic but realistic desk still life, no logos, no readable text.

items.title: 玄关托盘和钥匙并排
items.description: 当石头被放在钥匙旁边，玄学就不再遥远，而是和通勤一样变成日常动作。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, entryway tray with keys, earbuds, and one carefully chosen natural stone side by side, urban apartment styling, everyday ritual vibe, no logos, no readable text.

items.title: 出差酒店桌上的临时摆阵
items.description: 真正让人上头的不是买石头，而是去哪都想把那点秩序和安静带上。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, temporary arrangement of favorite natural stones on a hotel desk during travel, charger, notebook, city night outside the window, portable calm and order, no logos, no readable text.
